channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-24T09:37Z — 381 outages, 12,415 customers, 321 fair-weather, 5 DC-proximate
item.description: NC-DEC: 1613 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | GA-GPC: 881 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | NC-DEC: 720 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEC: 444 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
